We are working on a project to create a theatre sound playback application based on a successful iPad app called FX LIVE. This project is to take all of the existing functionality using common shared files to handle all of the audio processing and data models but then make the user interface more map like and take advantage of the additional screen space.
Everything should be done in SwiftUI
We should make sure we have duplicated all of the existing functionality and followed the same operational paradigms
Use the iPad app screen layouts as much as possible but with less use of popups because of the addtional screen real estate.
ITS VERY IMPORTANT THAT YOU DON'T MAKE ANY CHANGES TO THE SHARED FILES THAT COULD BREAK THE IPAD APP. We want to be able to maintain both codebases with as much shared code as possible. If you need to make changes to the shared files, please make sure that they are backward compatible and do not break the existing functionality of the iPad app.
